title: Operation Manager
description:
Job Description

1. Operational Leadership & Strategy

· Develop and implement operational strategies aligned with the company’s goals.

· Streamline workflows, policies, and procedures to improve efficiency.

· Monitor KPIs and operational performance, recommending improvements.

2. Project & Client Delivery Management

· Oversee consulting project execution, ensuring timely and high-quality delivery.

· Coordinate between cross-functional teams (consultants, HR, finance, IT).

· Manage client expectations and ensure service excellence.

3. Process Improvement & Compliance

· Identify bottlenecks and implement process enhancements.

· Ensure compliance with industry regulations and internal policies.

· Leverage technology (e.g., ERP, CRM) to automate and optimize operations.

4. Team Management & Development

· Lead, mentor, and develop the operations team.

· Foster a high-performance culture with accountability and continuous learning.

· Conduct performance reviews and workforce planning.

5. Financial & Resource Optimization

· Manage budgets, cost control, and resource allocation.

· Negotiate with vendors and optimize procurement processes.

· Analyze financial reports to drive cost-efficiency.

6. Business Growth Support

· Collaborate with leadership on business expansion strategies.

· Support proposal development and client engagement initiatives.

· Identify new operational opportunities to enhance profitability.


Requirements:

1. Bachelor's / Master in Business Administration, Operations Management or related field.

2. 8 year in operations, preferable in consulting/ professional services.

3. Proven track record in process improvement and team leadership.

4. Strong analytical, problem-solving and decision-making abilities.

5. Excellent communication and stakeholder management.

6. Profeciency in project management tools (e.g. Ms Project, Asana, Trello).

7. Knowledge of Lean, Six Sigma, or Agile methodologies is a plus.

postedCompany.description:
Wenetgroup Ltd is an enterprise management consulting firm. We are dedicated on providing professional service to assist our customers on problem solving and enlarge factors of success. We are focus on customer service and create Exquisite Service experience. Our HQ office is in Taiwan, Taipei. Our overseas office is located at America, Japan, Malaysia, Singapore.

Our service:

  1. Create new Business branding strategy
  2.  Plan and execute marketing strategy
  3. Plan integrated management
  4. Design operation management
  5. Cultivate and manage talents
  6. Other Professional Services (Project Management, Event Management, Finance Management, Lawyer, Human Resource Management, Technology Application…etc)
